trend_1.name: Red Blemish Clear Soothing Cream
trend_1.comment: Full of soothing ingredients for sensitive skin.
trend_1.review: Excellent soothing effect. Absorbs without stickiness, great for oily skin.
trend_1.warning: Check ingredients if you have specific allergies.

trend_2.name: Heartleaf 77 Soothing Toner
trend_2.comment: Good balance of sebum control and hydration.
trend_2.review: Tamed my break-outs. Perfect for use with cotton pads.

trend_3.name: 1025 Dokdo Toner
trend_3.comment: Mild toner with almost no irritating ingredients.
trend_3.review: Gentle and great for daily use. Seems to refine skin texture.
trend_3.warning: Rinse immediately if it gets in your eyes.

trend_4.name: Advanced Night Repair
trend_4.review: Expensive but definitely effective. Skin texture changes.

trend_5.name: Cicaplast Baume B5
trend_5.comment: Contains ingredients that help restore the skin barrier.
trend_5.review: A must-have for skin flare-ups. Calms down by the next day.

trend_6.name: Dive-In Low Molecular Hyaluronic Acid Serum
trend_6.comment: Excellent absorption with low molecular hyaluronic acid.
trend_6.review: Best for inner dryness. No stickiness, love it.

trend_7.name: Green Tea Seed Hyaluronic Serum
trend_7.comment: Serum with excellent green tea and moisture balance.

trend_8.name: Retinol Cica Repair Ampoule
trend_8.comment: Formulated for low irritation despite containing retinol.
trend_8.review: Nothing beats this for erasing marks.

trend_9.name: Vita C Green Tea Enzyme Brightening Serum

trend_10.name: Waterfull Essence Sunscreen
trend_10.comment: Light and moisturizing sun cream like an essence.
trend_10.review: Applies like lotion without any white cast.

analysis.title: Analysis Result
analysis.subtitle: Your skin type is
analysis.no_recommendations: No products found for this category.
analysis.disclaimer: This result is for reference only based on AI analysis and is not a medical diagnosis. Consult a specialist for accurate diagnosis.

descriptions.OSPT: A type with high sebum, sensitivity, and prone to blemishes. Needs oil-free products, soothing, and whitening care simultaneously.
descriptions.OSNT: Oily on the surface but tight inside. Hydration-deficient oily type. Focus on oil-water balance and soothing.
descriptions.OSPW: High sebum secretion with sensitivity and wrinkle concerns. Anti-aging care with low irritation is essential.
descriptions.OSNW: Sensitive and oily with rough skin texture and prone to fine wrinkles. Focus on hydration and barrier strengthening.
descriptions.ORPT: High sebum but strong skin barrier. Blessed oily type that only needs attention to blemishes. Focus on pore and pigment management.
descriptions.ORNT: Skin barrier is very solid and elastic. Optimal skin status can be maintained with proper sebum control.
descriptions.ORPW: Strong skin but concerned about blemish marks or wrinkles from oil. Recommended exfoliation and retinol care.
descriptions.ORNW: High sebum but not sensitive aging-prone oily type. Advantageous for absorbing strong anti-aging ingredients.
descriptions.DSPT: Thin and dry skin, sensitive to external stimuli and easily develops blemishes. Moisturization and sun protection are most important.
descriptions.DSNT: Low sebum secretion, very dry, and weak barrier. Build up the barrier with high-moisture ceramide cream.
descriptions.DSPW: Hard type with dryness, sensitivity, wrinkles, and blemishes. Needs sufficient nutrition and low-irritation whitening/anti-aging.
descriptions.DSNW: Very dry, sensitive, and prone to wrinkles. High-moisture antioxidant products with oil are recommended.
descriptions.DRPT: Lacks moisture but relatively strong skin. Prone to blemishes, so take care of Vitamin C and moisture together.
descriptions.DRNT: Skin is dry but texture is smooth and healthy. Maintains clear skin with moisture-focused care.
descriptions.DRPW: Prone to deepening wrinkles from dryness and noticeable blemishes. Rich anti-aging cream is effective.
descriptions.DRNW: Strong barrier but concerned about wrinkles from lack of moisture. Manage elasticity with nutrition-rich moisturizer.

6.text: Frequency of feeling itchy or stinging?

7.text: Degree of scars or acne marks remaining?

10.text: Wrinkles between eyebrows or mouth area?

reviews.rev1_content: My skin feels so moist and no irritation! I have sensitive skin but no troubles at all. 100% repurchasing!
reviews.rev2_content: Great moisturizing power and spreads well. The scent is a bit strong, so minus one star.

notices.n1_content:
Hello, this is the Clony Team.

The cosmetic database has been updated as of Feb 18th.
You can now check info for the latest cosmetics.

[Main Updates]
- 15 new brands added
- 500+ new 2026 S/S products registered
- Ingredient analysis algorithm improved

We will continue to strive for accurate information.
Thank you.
notices.n2_content:
Hello.

Server maintenance and bug fixes were conducted for better service stability.

- Fixed intermittent login failures
- Optimized app launch speed

We apologize for the inconvenience.
We will do our best for better service.
notices.n3_content:
Happy New Year! 🙇‍♂️

To celebrate Lunar New Year, we're giving 1,000P to all members.
You can check your points in My Page > Point History.

Have a great holiday with Clony!
